source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for crisp product UI, Geist Mono for compact analytics and tabular figures, and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, navigation, forms, status text, and dense dashboards.
layout: Slender 8px-or-less radii, clear-wing panels, fine vein-line separators, compact stream-bank navigation, dashboard/data density, precise forms and tables, quiet shadows, and azure/reed interaction hierarchy.

prompts.label: Transparent Motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in image_gen chroma-key source on #ff00ff, then local remove_chroma_key alpha extraction.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a damselfly body, isolated full insect subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A slender adult damselfly with accurate insect anatomy: long narrow azure-blue segmented body, fine reed-green thorax notes, delicate legs, tiny head, transparent clear wings folded neatly along the body with subtle veining and faint blue-green iridescence. The subject should read as a damselfly rather than a dragonfly, with a very slender profile and wings held close.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full body, head, legs, and folded wings without cropping; horizontal/diagonal pose suitable for a catalog motif asset.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves clear-wing detail, blue body color, reed-green accents, and fine anatomical structure.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no reed stem, no stream background, no leaf perch, no second insect, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light Design System
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Damselfly", derived from a slender damselfly motif: azure blue segmented body, reed green thorax accents, clear folded wings, fine black wing veins, and stream-bank clarity.
Reference use: Use the damselfly cutout visible in the conversation as the visual source. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the azure segmented body, reed-green markings, clear wing membrane, black vein lines, and stream-bank habitat.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 landscape board, high-resolution 3840x2160 source image if available, never portrait. Use a precise grid with large readable labels; avoid dense tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: Morphous Damselfly, Damselfly, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; labels should include Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数字.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, compact sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, table rows, command/search menu, status chips, loading/empty/error states, token swatches, texture samples, spacing/radius/shadow samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style analytics product design system board, slender and technical, precise grid, calm data density, 8px maximum radius cards and controls, clear-wing translucent panels, azure action states, reed-green focus states, fine dark vein dividers, stream-bank neutral surfaces.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals: clear wing white, stream mist, azure body blue, deep damselfly blue, reed green, vein ink, bank silt, wing membrane gray, ripple cyan.
Text: use short readable UI labels only; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: component radii 8px or less; no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple gradients, no neon rainbow palette, no stock UI kit look, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Damselfly" or "Damselfly".

prompts.label: Dark Design System
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Damselfly" / "Damselfly". Translate the light-mode Morphous Damselfly board visible in the conversation into dark mode; keep it recognizably the same slender analytics system, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the transparent damselfly motif and the light-mode Morphous Damselfly board visible in the conversation as strict references for palette roles, texture rhythm, component coverage, typography hierarchy, board organization, clear-wing panels, azure action states, reed-green focus states, fine vein dividers, and 8px maximum radii.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 landscape board, high-resolution 3840x2160 source image if available, never portrait. Use a precise grid with large readable labels; avoid dense tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: Morphous Damselfly, Damselfly, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Visual details: deep background derived from vein ink and deep damselfly blue; readable text in wing white and stream mist; azure blue as primary action and chart color; reed green as support and success/focus color; ripple cyan as info; bank silt as muted neutral; translucent clear-wing panels; fine dark wing-vein grid lines; calm stream-bank analytical hierarchy; compact shadcn/tweakcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and Japanese guidance with short readable labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数字.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, compact sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, table rows, command/search menu, status chips, loading/empty/error states, token swatches, texture samples, spacing/radius/shadow samples.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals: vein ink, deep damselfly blue, azure body blue, reed green, ripple cyan, wing white, stream mist, bank silt, wing membrane gray.
Text: use short readable UI labels only; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: component radii 8px or less; no unrelated insects, no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple gradients, no neon rainbow palette, no pure black flat-only background, no stock UI kit look, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Damselfly" or "Damselfly".
